title: Presidents’ Alliance and AICUM Applaud Court Decision Allowing Lawsuit Challenging Unlawful Student Visa Revocations and SEVIS Termination Policies to Proceed - Green & Spiegel

## Presidents’ Alliance and AICUM Applaud Court Decision Allowing Lawsuit Challenging Unlawful Student Visa Revocations and SEVIS Termination Policies to Proceed

## Presidents’ Alliance and AICUM Applaud Court Decision Allowing Lawsuit Challenging Unlawful Student Visa Revocations and SEVIS Termination Policies to Proceed
Jonathan Grode commented on a recent federal court decision allowing a major lawsuit challenging student visa revocations and SEVIS terminations to proceed, calling it “an important step forward” in holding agencies accountable. Grode emphasized that the case addresses serious due process concerns stemming from sweeping government actions that disrupted international students and universities nationwide, and noted the firm will continue advocating for transparency, fairness, and lawful administration of the student visa system as the case moves ahead.
- Jonathan A. Grode View Author Bio
